events: Demonic Cult summoned via Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation
Wedding ceremony interrupted by apostles
Ghost legion battle - 1000 vs 10000
Sword Demon beheads apostle general
Apostles of Evangelist of Everlasting Happiness sing lullaby
Only Death King, Heretic Questioner, and Raviel immune to sleep
Death King defeats dream apostles
deaths: Apostle of 'The Warhorse of the Eternal Plains' (general)
cause_effect: Apostles' song traps people in happy memories but fails against those already maximally happy (Death King at his wedding)
Sword Demon killing general causes entire ghost legion to vanish
notes: Sylvia Evanail revealed as final apostle. Wedding continues despite invasion.

events: Sylvia cornered by Death King
Revelation of three regressions
Butler sacrificed everything for Sylvia - name erased from world
Sylvia renounces Constellation blessing
Death King kills Sylvia with Sword of Idols
25th floor stage cleared
Third challenger listed as N/A
deaths: Sylvia Evanail (apostle of 'The Ox that Harvests Ruins')
loops: Three regressions revealed: Sylvia's wish to Ox that Harvests Ruins
Raviel's wish to Guardian Goddess fragment causing 10-day time loop
cause_effect: Sylvia gave everything to Constellation creating gap for possession
Butler sacrificed his name/existence for Sylvia's second chance
Sylvia renounces blessing to be reborn properly
notes: Butler's sacrifice is central emotional beat. Marriage to Raviel formally completed.

events: Post-wedding negotiations between Empire and Tower
Top rankers arrive at wedding
Death King introduces family/subordinates to Raviel
Reveals Preta was originally a nameless doppelganger monster
Introduces Shiny (Guardian Goddess)
Mentions Bae Hu-ryeong as first sword teacher
Dance between Death King and Raviel
cause_effect: Marriage creates diplomatic bridge between Empire and Tower
Raviel's authority controls empire side, Death King's trust controls Tower side
notes: Culture note: In empire, families meet after wedding. Shiny quickly switches allegiance to Raviel.

events: Prayer Sword absorbed by Shiny
Lefanta Aegim's legacy discussed - killing Constellations causes new ones to appear
Tower population boom: 113,654 entrants in one day
Death King becomes symbol/icon for refugees
Hunter ranking updated: Death King ranked #2
Black Dragon Master asks if Death King is ready to become king
cause_effect: Death King's heroics in previous stages cause massive population influx
Refugees and poor enter Tower seeing him as symbol of hope
Political power structure shifts with his rising influence
notes: Lady of the Golden Silk now serving as Raviel's maid. Death King plans to build house on 20th floor.

events: Guildmasters discuss making new society in Tower
Death King suggests targeting fairy tale Apocalypse 'Me and Our Scapegoat' as declaration of intent
All top rankers agree to participate together
Librarian presents the Apocalypse book
cause_effect: Choosing a moral cause over practical resources demonstrates leadership values
All guildmasters joining shows unity to Tower inhabitants
notes: Previous floors: 21-Library, 22-Chronicles of Heavenly Demon, 23-Saga of Iron Knights in Space, 24-Dawn Mountain Cabin, 25-Tale of Sormwyn Academy, 26-Festival City, 27-Bakery Street. Floor 28 is fairy tale.

events: Six guildmasters form alliance with hand-stack
Librarian designates them as characters of 'Me and Our Scapegoat'
Party ambushed immediately upon entry by millions of apostle children
Evangelist of Everlasting Happiness declares war
Shiny identifies Evangelist as fourth sister sword 'Sacrifice'
cause_effect: A-Class Apocalypse means Constellation is alive and hostile from start
Evangelist of Everlasting Happiness is the Sacrifice Sword that left Lefanta Aegim
notes: Unlike previous stages, Constellation attacks immediately with full force.

events: Skeleton army summoned via Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation
Skeletons immune to mental attacks because they have no memories
Infernal Heavens Demonic Art First Form: Sword of Starvation used with mirrors
Massacre of apostle army - tens of thousands wiped out per strike
Sacrifice Sword reveals utopia powered by one innocent child's screams
Death King declares he'll kill all apostles and re-summon them as ghosts
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art First Form: Sword of Starvation
cause_effect: Apostles who know only happiness are vulnerable to starvation/desire-based attacks
Death King's declaration shows his 'hell' is better than Sacrifice's 'hell'
notes: Death King proposes using Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation as permanent prison/execution system.

events: Death King details prison concept using Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation
Heretic Questioner excited about 'moving prison' idea
Guildmasters debate moral legitimacy vs efficiency
Sacrifice Sword surrenders
Sacrifice Sword absorbed by Holy Sword
28th floor cleared
Death King declares intent to clear to 30th floor same day
skills: Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation (proposed as prison system)
cause_effect: Death King's power to summon dead with memories makes him a walking prison
Absorbing Sacrifice completes more of Guardian Goddess
notes: Corner Librarian's favorability at 98. Death King added to favorite characters list alongside Constellation Killer.

events: Death King requests 'The Epic of Lefanta Aegim' from Librarian
Librarian reveals he loves Death King as character
Death King manipulates Librarian into giving forbidden book
Librarian reveals Lefanta Aegim is from Korea (Kim family)
Genre is 'High School Student Messes Around in an Isekai'
Lefanta on 50th floor
Librarian violates contract, gets penalized by Tower
Death King's blessings from Goddess of Beauty and Vitality suspended
cause_effect: Librarian's love of stories makes him vulnerable to temptation of crossover
Contract violation triggers Tower penalties
Death King loses favorability/observation blessings
notes: Lefanta Aegim = Kim, same surname origin. 'Aegim' means 'I, Kim'.

events: Lefanta's backstory: bullied Korean high school student who jumped from rooftop
Summoned to another world by Guardian Goddess
Used Salvation Sword power - sacrificed name syllable for power
Death King enters 50th floor
Void poison erodes body
Encounters mutated monsters
Lefanta Aegim saves Death King from monsters
cause_effect: 50th floor manager's death curse created void poison
Lefanta's amnesia means he doesn't recognize Shiny
notes: 50th floor is 'beginners area' boundary. Magic Towers dominate the floor. Lefanta has no memory beyond one week.

events: Lefanta confirms amnesia - can't remember past week
Uses diary relic from 'Great Puppy' Constellation to store memories
Death King confronts him about sealing Guardian Goddess and causing disasters
Lefanta offers reward for advice
Death King asks for protection during 50th floor stay
skills: Diary of Great Puppy (holy relic with infinite pages)
cause_effect: Lefanta acknowledges two mistakes: not considering new Constellations appearing after death, and neglecting dead Constellation curses
Death King uses promise as trap
notes: 1127 huntsmen trying to kill Lefanta. He writes everything down daily.

events: Death King provokes Magic Tower using Bae Hu-ryeong's old words
Magic Tower launches full mobilization against Death King and Lefanta
Lefanta fights tens of thousands of wizards using memory sacrifices
Others' Heavenly Song halves party stats
Lefanta systematically destroys magic formations
Negotiates week-long ceasefire with Magic Tower
cause_effect: Each memory Lefanta sacrifices powers one strike
Week-long memory reduced to one day after battle
notes: Lefanta's fighting style is reverse of Death King's - he discards memories while Death King accumulates them.

events: Death King vs Lefanta Aegim duel begins
All nine forms of Infernal Heavens Demonic Art used
Death King shouts that Lefanta is 'The Constellation Who Kills the Sky' not 'Killer of Constellations'
Death King pierces Lefanta's heart and diary
Lefanta 'dies'
Death King levels up to B-Class
cause_effect: Death King realizes he could have become Lefanta without Bae Hu-ryeong and Raviel
Infernal Heavens responds to all screams including Lefanta's
notes: Death King's rank jumps from ??? to C-Class then B-Class.

events: Lefanta reveals clone/body backup system
Clone was created after dying to Sword Emperor 153 years ago
Clone kills Death King
Death King's trauma enters new immersive level
Penalty is 'animal road'
Death King appears in high school setting
cause_effect: Bae Hu-ryeong killed Lefanta in past but Lefanta had clone prepared
Death killed by stronger opponent triggers trauma penalty
notes: Trauma is now fully immersive - not just observing but participating. Bae Hu-ryeong knew about clone system.

events: Death King enters trauma high school world at Shinseo High
Meets Heretic Questioner as fellow student
Raviel appears as chaebol girlfriend
Bae Hu-ryeong cast as father
Master cast as mother
Flame Emperor/Yoo Sooha cast as older brother
News about Yoo Sooha assault scandal
Death King attacks Flame Emperor upon seeing him as brother
cause_effect: Trauma creates idealized alternate reality where Death King has normal family
All characters from story recast in mundane roles
notes: Death King never attended high school in reality. The trauma world gives him the normal life he never had.
